violations.text: Frozen pastelitos were observed being stored from an unapproved source.PIC informed. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Ice machine taken out of serviced to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

(Deli meat and cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk in cooler fans and prep tables shelves) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The drainage from the ice machine is draining into the mop sink.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (back storage) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The (walls) in the (back storage ) area is in poor repair.Observed holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside and back storage area ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
